/**

 */

log.info("参保人员凭证: " + dataMap.insured_person_credentials__c)

log.info("上传结果: " + Fx.json.toJson(ret2))

log.info("财务报表: " + dataMap.financial_statementaudit_r__c)
Map ret3 = UploadFile.uploadContractFiles(dataMap, "financial_statementaudit_r__c")
log.info("上传结果: " + Fx.json.toJson(ret3))

function_name: 【计划任务】备货任务-生成上季度备货任务返利
remark:
计划任务条件：同时符合下述2个条件的【备货任务】才执行函数
·<年度/季度> = 上一个季度
·<任务完成率> 大于 100%

usedInfo.label: 生成上季度备货任务返利

body:
import com.fxiaoke.functions.http.Request
import com.fxiaoke.functions.http.HttpResult
import com.fxiaoke.functions.http.StringBody

String QUERY_API = "https://rpt.greatwall.com.cn/forFxUatSer/v1/for/fxp/interface"

Map arg = (syncArg ?: [:]) as Map
Map objData = (arg.get("objectData") ?: [:]) as Map

Long startTime = ((objData.get("startTime") ?: 0) as Long)
Long endTime = ((objData.get("endTime") ?: 0) as Long)
Integer pageSize = ((objData.get("limit") ?: 5000) as Integer)
Integer offset = ((objData.get("offset") ?: 0) as Integer)
Integer pageNum = ((objData.get("page_num") ?: ((offset as Integer) / pageSize + 1)) as Integer)

def toDateStr = { Object v ->
  try {
    java.text.SimpleDateFormat sdf = new java.text.SimpleDateFormat("yyyy-MM-dd")
    if (v instanceof Number) {
      long ms = ((Number)v).longValue(); return sdf.format(new java.util.Date(ms))
    }
    if (v instanceof String) {
      String s = (v as String).trim(); if (s.matches("\\d+")) { long ms = Long.parseLong(s); return sdf.format(new java.util.Date(ms)) } else { return s }
    }
  } catch (Exception e) {}
  return null
}

if (!startTime || !endTime) Fx.message.throwException("开始或结束时间为空")

Map requestData = [
  "code": "F_FX_QUERY_NCINVOICE",
  "data": [
    "start_time": toDateStr(startTime),
    "end_time": toDateStr(endTime),
    "page_num": pageNum,
    "page_size": pageSize
  ]
]

Map tokenInfo = GetAccessToken.getAccessToken()
if (!tokenInfo || !tokenInfo["accessToken"]) Fx.message.throwException("获取accessToken失败")

StringBody body = StringBody.builder().content(Fx.json.toJson(requestData)).build()
Request request = Request.builder()
  .method("POST")
  .url(QUERY_API)
  .timeout(30000)
  .retryCount(1)
  .header("Content-Type", "application/json")
  .header("accessToken", tokenInfo["accessToken"] as String)
  .body(body)
  .build()

def httpResult = Fx.http.execute(request)
if (!httpResult || httpResult.size() < 2 || httpResult[1] == null) {
  String errorMsg = httpResult && httpResult.size() > 2 ? (httpResult[2] as String) : "未知错误"
  Fx.message.throwException("查询失败: " + errorMsg)
}

HttpResult result = httpResult[1] as HttpResult
if (result.statusCode != 200) Fx.message.throwException("查询失败，状态码: " + result.statusCode)

Map resp = [:]
if (result.content instanceof String) {
  String contentStr = result.content as String
  resp = Fx.json.parse(contentStr) as Map
} else if (result.content instanceof Map) {
  resp = result.content as Map
}

String flag = (resp["flag"] ?: "") as String
String msg = (resp["msg"] ?: "") as String
if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase(flag)) {
  Integer total = ((resp["total"] ?: 0) as Integer)
  List rawList = (resp["data"] as List) ?: []
  List dataList = []
  rawList.each { Object o ->
    Map item = o as Map
    dataList.add([
      "objAPIName": "ncc_invoice_detail__c",
      "masterFieldVal": [
        "invoice_item_id": (item["invoice_item_id"] ?: ""),
        "vbillcode": (item["vbillcode"] ?: ""),
        "fx_contract_product_id": (item["fx_contract_product_id"] ?: ""),
        "dbilldate": (item["dbilldate"] ?: ""),
        "pn": (item["pn"] ?: ""),
        "material_desc": (item["material_desc"] ?: ""),
        "nastnum": (item["nastnum"] ?: 0),
        "nqtorigprice": (item["nqtorigprice"] ?: 0),
        "norigmny": (item["norigmny"] ?: 0),
        "nqtorigtaxprice": (item["nqtorigtaxprice"] ?: 0),
        "norigtaxmny": (item["norigtaxmny"] ?: 0),
        "ntaxrate": (item["ntaxrate"] ?: 0),
        "ntax": (item["ntax"] ?: 0),
        "fopposeflag": (item["fopposeflag"] ?: ""),
        "fstatusflag": (item["fstatusflag"] ?: ""),
        "create_time": (item["create_time"] ?: ""),
        "update_time": (item["update_time"] ?: "")
      ],
      "detailFieldVals": [:]
    ])
  }
  return [
    "errorCode": "200",
    "msg": msg ?: "查询成功",
    "data": [
      "totalNum": total ?: dataList.size(),
      "dataList": dataList
    ]
  ]
} else {
  return [
    "errorCode": "500",
    "msg": msg ?: "查询失败",
    "data": [
      "totalNum": 0,
      "dataList": []
    ]
  ]
}

 * @author 纷享-曹树斌

function_name: 【按钮前验证】推送订货单数据前校验
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【按钮前验证】推送订货单数据前校验
 * @description 验证订货单明细数量是否匹配
 * @createTime 2025-12-03
 * @bindingObjectLabel 订货单
 * @bindingObjectApiName purchase_order__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */

Map dataMap = context.data
String recordType = dataMap["record_type"] as String

// 备货类验证
if (recordType == "default__c") {
  Integer stockPreparatCount = dataMap["detail_countstock_preparat__c"] as Integer ?: 0
  Integer orderDetailPCount = dataMap["detail_countorder_detail_p__c"] as Integer ?: 0
  
  log.info("备货类验证 - 备货类产品数量: " + stockPreparatCount + ", 订货单明细_备货数量: " + orderDetailPCount)
  
  if (stockPreparatCount != orderDetailPCount) {
    String errorMsg = "明细数量不匹配：备货类产品数量(" + stockPreparatCount + ") 与 订货单明细_备货数量(" + orderDetailPCount + ") 不一致，请检查明细数据"
    log.error(errorMsg)
    return ["error": true, "errorMessage": errorMsg, "block": true]
  }
  
  log.info("备货类验证通过")
  return ["block": false]
}

// 项目类验证
if (recordType == "record_j2phk__c") {
  Integer projectTypeCount = dataMap["detail_count_project_type__c"] as Integer ?: 0
  Integer orderDetailSCount = dataMap["detail_countorder_detail_s__c"] as Integer ?: 0
  
  log.info("项目类验证 - 项目类产品数量: " + projectTypeCount + ", 订货单明细_特价及特配数量: " + orderDetailSCount)
  
  if (projectTypeCount != orderDetailSCount) {
    String errorMsg = "明细数量不匹配：项目类产品数量(" + projectTypeCount + ") 与 订货单明细_特价及特配数量(" + orderDetailSCount + ") 不一致，请检查明细数据"
    log.error(errorMsg)
    return ["error": true, "errorMessage": errorMsg, "block": true]
  }
  
  log.info("项目类验证通过")
  return ["block": false]
}

return ["block": false]

usedInfo.label: 推送

function_name: 【控制器】检查价目表明细价格状态
【流程】提货 - 提货明细统计状态
remark:
1. 若本【提货】的<状态> = 通过，则将本【提货】下的从表【提货_产品明细】的<统计状态>全部变更为 生效
2. 反之，若本【提货】的<状态> = 废弃，则将本【提货】下的从表【提货_产品明细】的<统计状态>全部变更为 空。
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【流程】提货 - 提货明细统计状态
 * @description 1. 若本【提货】的<状态> = 通过，则将本【提货】下的从表【提货_产品明细】的<统计状态>全部变更为 生效
2. 反之，若本【提货】的<状态> = 废弃，则将本【提货】下的从表【提货_产品明细】的<统计状态>全部变更为 空。
 * @createTime 2025-12-16
 * @bindingObjectLabel 提货
 * @bindingObjectApiName goods_pickup__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */
String status = context.data.status__c as String
log.info("状态：" + status) //1：待推送，2：已推送,待审批，other：其他，3：审批中，4：通过，5：驳回，6：废弃
String statisticalStatus = ""
if( status == "4" ){ //通过
  //更新【提货_产品明细】统计状态为生效
  statisticalStatus = "option_take_effect__c"
}else if( status == "6"){ //废弃
  //更新【提货_产品明细】统计状态为空
  statisticalStatus = ""
}

String DetailobjectApiName = "goods_pickup_product_detail__c"
QueryTemplate query = QueryTemplate.AND(
  ["pickup_time__c": QueryOperator.EQ(context.data._id as String)]
)
def result = Fx.object.update(DetailobjectApiName, query, ["statistical_status__c": statisticalStatus], UpdateAttribute.builder().build()).result() as String
log.info(result)

usedInfo.label: 工作流：【提货】状态变更工作流

function_name: 【流程】订货单-自动生成订货单明细
remark:
函数根据本【订货单】名下的2个从表，对应的一比一生成【订货单_产品明细】
·【订货单明细_备货】生成：          业务类型=备货明细的【订货单_产品明细】

·业务类型=项目类-标品特价的【订货单明细_特价及特配】生成：
 业务类型=项目类-标品特价的【订货单_产品明细】

·业务类型=项目类-特殊配置的【订货单明细_特价及特配】生成：
 业务类型=项目类-特殊配置的【订货单_产品明细】
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【流程】订货单-自动生成订货单明细
 * @description 函数根据本【订货单】名下的2个从表，对应的一比一生成【订货单_产品明细】
·【订货单明细_备货】生成：          业务类型=备货明细的【订货单_产品明细】

·业务类型=项目类-标品特价的【订货单明细_特价及特配】生成：
 业务类型=项目类-标品特价的【订货单_产品明细】

·业务类型=项目类-特殊配置的【订货单明细_特价及特配】生成：
 业务类型=项目类-特殊配置的【订货单_产品明细】
 * @createTime 2025-12-03
 * @bindingObjectLabel 订货单
 * @bindingObjectApiName purchase_order__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */


String recordType = context.data.record_type as String //业务类型 default__c:备货类;record_j2phk__c:项目类;
String dataId = context.data._id as String //订货单id
log.info("业务类型：" + recordType)

if( recordType == "default__c" ){ //备货类,从表【订货单明细_备货】生成：业务类型=备货明细的【订货单_产品明细】

  def ret = Fx.object.find(
    "purchase_order_dtl_stockup__c", // 查询订货单明细_备货
    FQLAttribute.builder()
      .columns(["_id", "name", "price_list_detail__c","productcommoditygoods__c","tax_included_unit_priceyua__c","quantity__c",
                "total_amount_including_tax__c","delivery_date__c","is_customized__c","configuration_info__c",
                "product_model__c","product_catalog__c","price_list_price__c"]) // 返回的数据字段
      .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["order_form__c": QueryOperator.EQ(dataId)]))
      .build(),
    SelectAttribute.builder().build()
  ).result() as QueryResult
  log.info("备货明细数量："+ret.size)
  if( ret.size > 0){
    //创建订货单明细
    ret.dataList.each { detail ->
      Map detailMap = [
        "record_type": "default__c", //业务类型
        "price_list_detail__c": detail["price_list_detail__c"], //关联价目表明细
        "productcommoditygoods__c": detail["productcommoditygoods__c"], //商品
        "tax_included_unit_priceyua__c": detail["tax_included_unit_priceyua__c"], //含税单价(元)
        "quantity__c": detail["quantity__c"], //数量
        "total_amount_including_tax__c": detail["total_amount_including_tax__c"], //含税合计金额(元)
        "delivery_date__c": detail["delivery_date__c"], //交货日期
        "is_customized__c": detail["is_customized__c"] == "option_customized__c" ? "1": detail["is_customized__c"] == "option_non_customized__c"? "2":"0", //是否定制
        "product_model__c": detail["product_model__c"], //产品型号
        "product_catalog__c": detail["product_catalog__c"], //产品分类
        "price_list_price__c": detail["price_list_price__c"], //价目表单价(元)
        "order_form__c": dataId//订货单
        //"configuration_info__c": detail["configuration_info__c"]//配置信息
      ]
      def ret1 = Fx.object.create("purchase_order_product_dtl__c", detailMap, null, CreateAttribute.builder().build()).result() as Map
      log.info("创建订货单明细结果：" + ret1)
    }
  }
}else if( recordType == "record_j2phk__c" ){ //项目类，从表【订货单明细_特价及特配】生成：业务类型=项目类-标品特价的【订货单_产品明细】和业务类型=项目类-特殊配置的【订货单_产品明细】
  def ret1 = Fx.object.find(
    "purchase_order_special_price_config__c", // 查询出库单产品对象
    FQLAttribute.builder()
      .columns(["_id", "name","record_type","find_association__c","crm_quotation_product_id__c","productcommoditygoods__c","tax_included_unit_priceyua__c","quantity__c","total_amount_including_tax__c","delivery_date__c","is_customized__c","configuration_info__c","product_model__c","product_catalog__c"]) // 返回的数据字段
      .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["order_form__c": QueryOperator.EQ(dataId)]))
      .build(),
    SelectAttribute.builder().build()
  ).result() as QueryResult
  log.info("特价及特配明细数量："+ret1.size)
  if( ret1.size > 0){
    //创建订货单明细
    ret1.dataList.each { detail ->
      Map detailMap = [
        "record_type": detail["record_type"] == "default__c" ? "record_j2phk__c":"record_dC45W__c", //业务类型
        "find_association__c": detail["find_association__c"], //关联产品
        "crm_quotation_product_id__c": detail["crm_quotation_product_id__c"], //CRM报价单产品id
        "productcommoditygoods__c": detail["productcommoditygoods__c"], //商品
        "tax_included_unit_priceyua__c": detail["tax_included_unit_priceyua__c"], //含税单价(元)
        "quantity__c": detail["quantity__c"], //数量
        "total_amount_including_tax__c": detail["total_amount_including_tax__c"], //含税合计金额(元)
        "delivery_date__c": detail["delivery_date__c"], //交货日期
        "is_customized__c": detail["is_customized__c"] == "option_customized__c" ? "1": detail["is_customized__c"] == "option_non_customized__c"? "2":"0", //是否定制
        "product_model__c": detail["product_model__c"], //产品型号
        "product_catalog__c": detail["product_catalog__c"], //产品分类
        "order_form__c": dataId //订货单
        //"configuration_info__c": detail["configuration_info__c"]//配置信息
      ]
      def ret = Fx.object.create("purchase_order_product_dtl__c", detailMap, null, CreateAttribute.builder().build()).result() as Map
      log.info("创建订货单明细结果：" + ret)
    }
  }
}else{
  log.info("无法获取到业务类型！")
  return
}

function_name: 【流程】NCC发票明细 - NCC发票关联备货任务
remark:
1、先根据本【NCC发票明细】数据的<订货单_产品明细>，找到其主表【订货单】；
2、去【备货任务】中，找到同时符合下述条件的数据，写入到本数据的<备货任务>内；
·【备货任务】的<T1分销商> 等于上述第一步找到的【订货单】关联的【T1分销商】
·本【NCC发票明细】的<开票日期>所在的 <年度/季度>范围的【备货任务】
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【流程】NCC发票明细 - NCC发票关联备货任务
 * @description 1、先根据本【NCC发票明细】数据的<订货单_产品明细>，找到其主表【订货单】；
2、去【备货任务】中，找到同时符合下述条件的数据，写入到本数据的<备货任务>内；
·【备货任务】的<T1分销商> 等于上述第一步找到的【订货单】关联的【T1分销商】
·本【NCC发票明细】的<开票日期>所在的 <年度/季度>范围的【备货任务】
 * @createTime 2025-12-09
 * @bindingObjectLabel NCC发票明细
 * @bindingObjectApiName ncc_invoice_detail__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */
String id = context.data._id as String //数据id
String orderProductDetail = context.data.find_association__c as String //订货单_产品明细
Date date = context.data.date__c as Date //开票日期
log.info("开票日期：" + date)
log.info("订货单_产品明细：" + orderProductDetail)


//通过订货单_产品明细查询订货单
def ret1 = Fx.object.find(
    "purchase_order_product_dtl__c", // 查询订货单_产品明细对象
    FQLAttribute.builder()
      .columns(["_id", "name","order_form__c"]) // 返回的数据字段
      .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["_id": QueryOperator.EQ(orderProductDetail)]))
      .build(),
    SelectAttribute.builder().build()
  ).result() as QueryResult
log.info("订货单—产品明细："+ret1)
List dataList1 = ret1.dataList as List
String orderId = dataList1[0]["order_form__c"] as String //订货单id
log.info("订货单id：" + orderId)
//通过订货单id查询T1分销商
def ret2 = Fx.object.find(
    "purchase_order__c", // 查询订货单
    FQLAttribute.builder()
      .columns(["_id", "name","T1_distributor__c"]) // 返回的数据字段
      .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["_id": QueryOperator.EQ(orderId)]))
      .build(),
    SelectAttribute.builder()
      .fillExtendInfo(true)
      .build()
  ).result() as QueryResult
  log.info("订货单："+ret2)
  log.info("订货单-T1经销商："+ret2.dataList[0]["T1_distributor__c__r"])

//通过开票日期查询年度季度 起始和终止日期
Integer year = date.year as Integer
Integer month = date.month as Integer
Integer quarter = 1
if (month <= 3)       quarter = 1
    else if (month <= 6)  quarter = 2
    else if (month <= 9)  quarter = 3
    else                  quarter = 4
Integer startMonth = (quarter - 1) * 3 + 1   // 1,4,7,10
Integer endMonth   = startMonth + 3          // 3,6,9,12
Integer startYear = year
Integer endYear = year
log.info("本季度起始月："+startMonth+"，下一季度起始月："+endMonth)
//季度结束日期需要处理跨年的情况，例如12月的季度结束日期为下一年的3月1日
if( endMonth > 12){
  endMonth = endMonth - 12
  endYear ++
}
if( startMonth <= 0){
  startMonth =startMonth + 12
  startYear --
}
Date startDate
Date endDate
if( startMonth < 10 ){
  startDate = Date.of(startYear + "-0" + startMonth + "-01") as Date
}else{
  startDate = Date.of(startYear + "-" + startMonth + "-01") as Date
}
if( endMonth < 10 ){
  endDate = Date.of(endYear + "-0" + endMonth + "-01") as Date
}else{
  endDate = Date.of(endYear + "-" + endMonth + "-01") as Date
}

log.info("本季度开始日期："+startDate+",下季度开始日期："+endDate)


//通过T1分销商和年度季度查询备货任务
def ret3 = Fx.object.find(
    "stockup_task__c", // 查询备货任务
    FQLAttribute.builder()
      .columns(["_id", "name","annual_quarter__c"]) // 返回的数据字段
      .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["T1_distributor__c": QueryOperator.EQ(ret2.dataList[0]["T1_distributor__c"] as String)],
                                        ["annual_quarter__c":QueryOperator.GTE(startMonth)],
                                        ["annual_quarter__c":QueryOperator.LT(endDate)]))
      .build(),
    SelectAttribute.builder().build()
  ).result() as QueryResult
log.info("备货任务："+ret3)
List dataList3 = ret3.dataList as List
String stockTask = dataList3[0]["_id"] as String
log.info("备货任务id："+stockTask)

//更新备货任务到NCC发票明细
def (Boolean error, Map data, String errorMessage) = Fx.object.update("ncc_invoice_detail__c", id, ["stock_preparation_task__c": stockTask], UpdateAttribute.builder().triggerWorkflow(true).build())
if (error) {
  log.info("error:" + errorMessage)
}

body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【集成】订货单-上传单章合同附件
 * @description 订货单单章合同附件推送接口
 * @createTime 2025-12-02
 * @bindingObjectLabel --
 * @bindingObjectApiName NONE
 * @函数需求编号
 */
log.info(context.data.sync_success_time__c)
log.info("经销商单章合同附件: " + context.data.distributor_single_chapter__c)
Map dataMap = context.data as Map
String objectAPIName = "purchase_order__c"
String dataId = dataMap._id as String
Map result = UploadFile.uploadContractFiles(dataMap, "distributor_single_chapter__c")
log.info("上传结果: " + Fx.json.toJson(result))

String flag = (result["flag"] ?: "") as String
if ("true".equalsIgnoreCase(flag)) {
  Map updateData = [
    "sync_success_time__c": DateTime.now()
  ]
  def(Boolean error, Map data, String errorMessage) = 
    Fx.object.update(objectAPIName, dataId, updateData, UpdateAttribute.builder().triggerWorkflow(true).build())
  return ["flag": "true", "msg": "文件推送成功。"]
}

return result

remark:
找到当前数据的<负责人>（即分销商人员）的【人员】数据，找到其<所属T1分销商>关联的【T1分销商】：
·【T1分销商】主属性写入到本数据的<T1分销商>内；
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【UI函数】市场活动归属T1-页面加载事件
 * @description 找到当前数据的<负责人>（即分销商人员）的【人员】数据，找到其<所属T1分销商>关联的【T1分销商】：
·【T1分销商】主属性写入到本数据的<T1分销商>内；
 * @createTime 2025-11-28
 * @bindingObjectLabel 市场活动
 * @bindingObjectApiName MarketingEventObj
 * @函数需求编号
 */

String id = context.data._id as String //数据id
List ownerList = context.data.owner as List
log.info("负责人：" + ownerList)
String ownerStr = ownerList[0] as String
log.info("负责人：" + ownerStr)
def (Boolean error, Map data, String errorMessage) = Fx.org.findUserById(ownerStr)
String t1DealerId = data["belonged_T1_distributor__c"] as String
log.info("负责人所属T1分销商：" + t1DealerId)
def (Boolean error1, Map data1, String errorMessage1) = Fx.object.findById(
  "AccountObj",
  t1DealerId,
  FQLAttribute.builder()
    .columns(["_id", "name", "channel_manager__c"])
    .build(),
  SelectAttribute.builder()
    .build()
)
String gwSalesName = data1["channel_manager__c"] as String
log.info("T1长城销售姓名：" + gwSalesName)
UIEvent event = UIEvent.build(context) {
  editMaster("T1_distributor__c": t1DealerId)
}
return event

remark:
自动抓取本数据的<提货>关联的【提货】数据上的对应字段的值，写入到本数据的同名字段。
·<订货单>
·<T1分销商>
commit_log: v20251120 电子发票的订货单及T1
body:
/**
 * @author 纷享-曹树斌
 * @codeName 【流程】电子发票的订货单及T1
 * @description 自动抓取本数据的<提货>关联的【提货】数据上的对应字段的值，写入到本数据的同名字段。
·<订货单>
·<T1分销商>
 * @createTime 2025-11-20
 * @bindingObjectLabel 电子发票
 * @bindingObjectApiName electronic_invoice__c
 * @函数需求编号
 */
String id = context.data._id as String // 出库单产品ID
String pickUpGoodsId = context.data.pick_up_goods__c as String // 提货关联字段

def ret = Fx.object.find(
  "goods_pickup__c", // 查询提货对象
  FQLAttribute.builder()
    .columns(["_id", "name", "order_form__c","T1_distributor__c"]) // 返回的数据字段
    .queryTemplate(QueryTemplate.AND(["_id": QueryOperator.EQ(pickUpGoodsId)]))
    .build(),
  SelectAttribute.builder().build()
).result() as QueryResult
log.info(ret)


if (ret.size > 0) {
  Map data = ret.dataList[0] as Map
  log.info("订货单："+data["order_form__c"])
  log.info("T1经销商："+data["T1_distributor__c"])
  // 更新<订货单>对象的对应字段
  def (Boolean error, Map data1, String errorMessage) = Fx.object.update("electronic_invoice__c", id, ["T1_distributor__c": data["T1_distributor__c"],"order_form__c": data["order_form__c"]], UpdateAttribute.builder().triggerWorkflow(true).build())
  if (error) {
    log.info("error:" + errorMessage)
  }
  log.info(data1)
}
